content.en:
Ye Tian knew that he was an intruder, but he did not prevent him from cooperating with the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect, after all, even the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect could not compete with the Blood Mist Alliance.

Therefore, the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect was really in urgent need of other forces to cooperate with it, and Ye Tian's arrival would only make the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect happy.

As for Ye Tian's occupation of the Haitian Holy Sect, it was nothing at all.

Whoa!!

A supreme-level exotic powerhouse descended on the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect one after another, obviously they all received a summons from the Ten Thousand Thousand Sacred Beasts, coupled with the threat of the Blood Mist Alliance, they had to unite, otherwise they would be harvested by the Blood Mist Alliance one by one.

Moreover, unless those foreign forces break the gate now and completely cut off the connection with the Holy Land Heaven and Earth, they will also be built by the Blood Mist Alliance in the future, and the foreign world that connects them will also face an invasion from the Blood Mist Alliance.

Therefore, in order to protect the door, they must unite and fight against the Blood Mist Alliance.

Unless it is a desperate situation, these foreign powerhouses will not easily give up the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

Almost in a few moments, the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect gathered a large number of supreme-level exotic powerhouses.

In the second level of the Supreme Level alone, there are a full thirteen people gathered here, and there are dozens of people in the first level of the Supreme Level.

There were so many exotic powerhouses that made the Ten Thousand Thousand Sacred Beasts breathe a sigh of relief a little.

Rumble!!!!!

The Supreme True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance arrived, almost surrounding the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect.

"Blood Mist Alliance, what exactly do you want to do?"

The Ten Thousand Sacred Beast asked.

The White Turtle True Emperor smiled and said, "I don't have any ideas, our purpose is very simple, that is, to destroy the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth and completely control the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth." I know that you supreme-level existences are not from the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth, if you leave now, our Blood Mist Alliance will not attack you, otherwise we will treat you as a member of the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth and wipe them all out!"

After saying this, the White Turtle True Emperor showed his strength.

The coercion of the third level of the Supreme True Emperor spread, causing the expressions of many strong people present to change drastically one by one.

"The Third Level of the Supreme True Emperor !!!"

Ye Tian was also extremely surprised.

This kind of powerhouse is only one step away from the invincible ancestor, he is not the opponent of the other party, and he can't beat it at all.

The Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast was also panicked, he looked around, and many foreign powerhouses hesitated.

The Blood Mist Alliance has sent too many Supreme True Emperors this time, and there are also powerhouses of the third level of the Supreme True Emperor descending, obviously to destroy the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth at all costs.

They are not creatures of the Holy Realm, so there is no need to fight hard for the Holy Realm.

Although they lost the Sacred Heaven and Earth, an exotic world, and could not enter again in the future, at least they would not fall, and there was still hope to find other exotic worlds, and even some forces connected more than one exotic world, so there was no need to work hard.

Suddenly, an exotic powerhouse left, and the Blood Mist Alliance really didn't stop him.

In a short period of time, there were many fewer foreign powerhouses here in the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect.

According to this trend, other foreign powerhouses will not stay anymore when they see that the situation is not good.

At that time, the Ten Thousand Beast Holy Sect would have no hope of surviving.

No matter how you look at it, the Ten Thousand Beasts Holy Sect seems to be in a desperate situation.

Ye Tian didn't leave, because there was no need to go.

The doppelganger Heyuan Holy Beast will definitely be regarded by the Blood Mist Alliance as a creature of the Holy Realm, so the Blood Mist Alliance will not let the Heyuan Holy Beast leave.

As for Ye Tian's own copy body, if it fell, it would only lose some energy, and it would not cost much.

That's why he won't leave.

"Blood Mist Alliance, do you really want to destroy our Sanctuary Heaven and Earth?"

The Ten Thousand Sacred Beast roared.

"That's good!" the White Turtle True Emperor sneered: "If those foreign powerhouses haven't left yet, with your strength, you will really cause us some trouble, and maybe you will even kill several Supreme True Emperors of our Blood Mist Alliance." But now, the foreign powerhouses are almost finished, and with your little strength, they are far from being able to compete with us. "

Just when the White Turtle True Emperor was about to make a move, the aura on the body of the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast changed.

Suddenly, he took out at least ten Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals and swallowed these Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals at once.

These were all Origin Rule Robbery Crystals that belonged to the Sacred Realm Heaven and Earth, not the Exotic Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, so they didn't help the Ten Thousand Sacred Beasts much.

However, it was useless for him to swallow so many Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals at once, and it would not allow him to step into the third level of the Supreme Holy Beast at all.

However, the aura on the body of the Ten Thousand Sacred Beast became more and more terrifying, but its body was full of cracks, and the death-like aura permeated out.

At the same time, the rules of heaven and earth have changed.

The Heyuan Holy Beast didn't feel much, but Ye Tian's copy body felt the suppression of the surrounding rules.

"Not good, rewind !!"

The White Turtle True Emperor said in horror.

"Robbery, retreat!"

The Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast spoke.

In an instant, some of the Supreme True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance were covered by a terrifying rule, and their bodies were directly annihilated, leaving no trace behind.

And the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast itself was not having a good time, and part of its body was permanently annihilated.

"You actually have a trace of authority in the Holy Realm, how can you have such a secret technique?"

The White Turtle True Emperor was terrified.

The authority of heaven and earth is the rule that can urge, transform, and improve a heaven and earth, which does not seem to be of much help and cannot enhance one's combat effectiveness.

However, the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast was able to modify the rules of an area he had formulated, and the rules to the extent that no catastrophe had occurred, was equivalent to erasing the catastrophe.

If there is no great tribulation, where the powerhouses of the foreign land dare to invade the holy realm heaven and earth, they will be wiped out by the heaven and earth.

And just now those Supreme True Emperors were like this, the area where they were located was wiped out of the Great Tribulation, and without the Great Tribulation, they were directly erased by the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

Not to mention these first-level Supreme True Emperors, even the third-level Supreme True Emperors who are infinitely close to the Invincible True Emperor realm can't compete with the Holy Realm Heaven and Earth.

"Hahaha, even if I fight for this life, I will give you a heavy blow to the Blood Mist Alliance!!!"

The Ten Thousand Sacred Beast went crazy.

He knew that he would not be able to live, and with his strength, he would naturally not be able to perform such a secret technique, so he could only pay for his life.

A second-level Supreme True Emperor did not escape in time, and was directly erased by heaven and earth.

These Supreme True Emperors fled, the Ten Thousand Thousand Holy Beasts chased and killed, and one of the Supreme True Emperors of the Blood Mist Alliance fell one after another.

At this time, the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast knew that it was almost unable to hold on, and directly descended on the Blood Mist Forbidden Land.

No one dared to stop it, and they couldn't stop it.

"Crush me!"

The Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast did its best and slammed into this second-order gate with one blow.

However, even if he tried his best, he couldn't break this second-order gate.

With the final blow, the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast shattered a corner of the second-order gate at the cost of its life.

Subsequently, the Ten Thousand Yuan Holy Beast fell and died.

And at this time, the White Turtle True Emperor dared to appear here, and another third-level Supreme True Emperor was also standing aside, and the faces of the two Supreme True Emperors were extremely gloomy.
